# Naming Convention

## 1. Custom DocType

- `PH Batch Release`
- `PH Temperature Log`
- `PH Recall Case`

## 2. Warehouse

- `WH-BD-RM-QUA`
- `WH-BD-RM-REL`
- `WH-BD-FG-QUA`
- `WH-BD-FG-REL`
- `WH-HCM-FG-REL`
- `WH-HN-FG-REL`

## 3. Document Series

- Customer: `CUS-B2B-.YYYY.-`
- Supplier: `SUP-RM-.YYYY.-`
- Sales Order: `SO-B2B-.YYYY.-`
- Purchase Order: `PO-RM-.YYYY.-`
- Delivery Note: `DN-.YYYY.-`
- Sales Invoice: `SINV-.YYYY.-`
- Batch: `BATCH-ITEMCODE-YYMM-###`

## 4. Coding conventions

- App name: `pharma_vn`
- Python package: `pharma_vn`
- API module: `pharma_vn.api.*`
- Automation module: `pharma_vn.automation.*`
- Utility module: `pharma_vn.utils.*`
